response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software and infrastructure engineering with 15+ years across diverse roles and technologies, including AI-agent infrastructure. However, his expertise is more aligned with general software development and engineering leadership rather than specialized AI strategy or cloud platform roles. The lack of explicit AI products, platforms, or entrepreneurial experience in larger organizations slightly reduces his fit for this director-level AI strategy position.
strengths: 15+ years of software and infrastructure engineering experience across multiple domains and technologies
Recent work in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, agentic workflows)
Strong engineering leadership demonstrated through mentoring, workshops, and project development
concerns: Limited direct experience with cloud AI platforms or AI product development at scale
No clear entrepreneurial or startup experience within larger organizations
AI expertise is more tooling-focused rather than strategic product/platform building
